field.name: istage
field.devnotes: xstage times 10, for convenience of plotting

field.name: DaySSow
field.devnotes: Anzahl nicht ausgebildeter Blätter zum Zeitpunkt Xstage 2

field.name: nL_MS
field.devnotes: non integer growth stage indicator ranging from zero to six

field.name: TSumEC30
field.devnotes: number of leaves on main stem

field.name: daylengthp
field.devnotes: initial leaf number on main stem

field.name: p1v
field.devnotes: genetic specific parameter of photoperiod sensitivity

field.name: sdepth
field.devnotes: genetic specific parameter of vernalisation sensitivity

field.name: phint
field.devnotes: sowing depth (cm): TPar; not actual in use

field.name: p3
field.devnotes: the phyllochron interval: TPar; the interval in thermal time (degree days) between successive leaf and tiller appearances

field.name: p4
field.devnotes: End of leaf growth and beginning of ear growth to end of pre-anthesis ear growth

field.name: p5
field.devnotes: thermal time between Pre-anthesis ear growth to beginning of grain filling (anthesis occurs during this phase)in°Cd

field.name: p9
field.devnotes: thermal time between beginning of grain fill and maturity in°Cd

field.name: tBase
field.devnotes: thermal timen from germination to seedling emergence in °Cd

field.name: sowingdate
field.devnotes: Multiplikator des Phyllochronintervalls in der Schossenphase

field.name: ini_inLMS
field.devnotes: interval in thermal time between leaf initiation

field.name: xstage_fin_leaf_prim
field.devnotes: initial number of initiated leaves at emergence

field.name: TSumInternode
field.devnotes: xstage an dem kiene weiteren leaf primordien angelegt werden

field.name: MaxPhotoperiod
field.devnotes: maximum number of vernalisation days which increase developmental rate

field.name: VernMinTemp
field.devnotes: maximum daylength which increase developmental rate

field.name: VernOptTemp2
field.devnotes: temperature where vernalisation is starting to be optimal

field.name: VernMaxTemp
field.devnotes: temperature where vernalisation is ending to be optimal

field.name: fdl
field.devnotes: temperature where vernalisation is getting zero
